form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign fifth of 13 at Baden Baden October 17 over 2400m, soft track; 4 len behind Royal Ito carrying 57.5kg at $7. On debut fifth of 7 at Clairefontaine July 2 over 2400m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Karla Jet carrying 58kg at $11. Hasn't shown enough.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of eight months. Finished off last preparation second of 12 at Dusseldorf August 3 over 2200m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Oak Ivy carrying 57.5kg at $3. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 0.8 len Krefeld April 27 over 1700m defeating Willy Campbell with 58kg at $3.60. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of eight months. form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of five-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign post a big 5 len win. Hannover October 26 over 1600m slow track defeating Ostseesonne with 56.5kg at $4.90. When resuming last campaign second of 9 at Hannover in the G2 August 24 over 2000m, 1.3 len behind Go Flying carrying 58kg at $6.90. Has the talent to take this out.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign second last of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on December 19 over 1600m, 10 len behind Quasar carrying 56kg at $25. Won previous preparation first up won by 2 len at Mannheim March 29 2025 over 1900m defeating Almotlaa with 59kg at $2.50. Will struggle against these.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation eighth of 10 at Nancy November 16 over 2000m, 23 len behind Wonder Boy with 58.5kg. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len Krefeld G2 June 8 over 1700m slow track defeating Arctica Spirit with 58kg at $3.60. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at Mulheim August 23 over 2200m, a head behind Dawn Sky carrying 58kg at $3.20. On debut third of 10 at Mulheim July 13 over 2100m, 1.75 len behind Danylov with 57.5kg at $11.60. Can return in winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at Mulheim August 23 over 2200m, a head behind Dawn Sky carrying 58kg at $3.20. On debut third of 10 at Mulheim July 13 over 2100m, 1.75 len behind Danylov with 57.5kg at $11.60. Can return in winning form.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 51-day let-up. Last start got back early 11th of 14 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 14 over 2400m, 8 len behind Exhit with 56.5kg at $28. The race before that 7th of 12 at Lyon-la-Soie on January 21 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Lio De La Plata with 57kg at $23. Easily accounted for last time out but this suits.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9.5). Comes here off a 51-day let-up. Last start got back early 11th of 14 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 14 over 2400m, 8 len behind Exhit with 56.5kg at $28. The race before that 7th of 12 at Lyon-la-Soie on January 21 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Lio De La Plata with 57kg at $23. Easily accounted for last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at this track September 28 over 2400m, 6 len behind Ageless Lips carrying 62.5kg at $10.60. First up last campaign second in a small field at this track September 12 over 2200m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Flying Sonya carrying 60.5kg at $8.40. Must be included.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 6th of 13 at Mulheim on March 22 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Oak Lahoma carrying 57.5kg at $11.90. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at Dusseldorf on August 3 over 1700m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Carlton Banks with 61.5kg at $11.40. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 11th of 13 at Mulheim on March 22 over 2400m, 7 len behind Oak Lahoma carrying 55.5kg at $14. Previously second-up second last of 7 at this track on June 9 over 2400m, slow going 8 len behind Kampfer with 62.5kg at $23. One of the top chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. First-up after five months 11th of 13 at Mulheim on March 22 over 2400m, 7 len behind Oak Lahoma carrying 55.5kg at $14. form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign third of 12 at Krefeld November 15 over 2200m, 9 len behind Kopenhagen carrying 61.5kg at $18.70. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at Krefeld June 8 over 1700m, soft track; 33 len behind Pippas Girl carrying 57.5kg at $4.50. Don't underestimate.
